name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express at 11705 SW Pacific Hwy Ste Y, Tigard, OR 97223 in the Metzger neighborhood is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.6 stars across 337 reviews. Call +1 503-968-1010.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations across multiple states, including Colorado, with a focus on quick-access financial products for consumers who need immediate funds. The company offers a diverse range of services beyond traditional payday loans, positioning itself as a multi-service financial center rather than a single-product lender. Their service offerings include installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and online loan options, indicating an attempt to serve various consumer financial needs beyond emergency cash alone.
address: 11705 SW Pacific Hwy Ste Y, Tigard, OR 97223

company_info.headquarters: 11705 SW Pacific Hwy Ste Y, Tigard, OR 97223

pros: Multiple service offerings beyond loans (check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Online loan options available in addition to physical store locations
Established multi-state presence with store locator functionality
Customer service available via phone and email with dedicated internet operations line
Installment loan products available alongside title loans for different financial situations
Business services offered, expanding beyond consumer-only products
cons: Website location pages return 404 errors, making it impossible to verify store availability or location-specific details
No pricing, APR, or loan term information visible on provided website content
State-specific restrictions mentioned (some loan types unavailable in certain states) create uncertainty about eligibility
Limited transparency about product features, repayment options, or borrower requirements
Store closure notices (Hurricane Ida) suggest operational challenges and potential service interruptions
best_for: Consumers needing quick access to cash with collateral (title loans)
Customers in states where ACE operates who prefer in-person financial services
People needing bundled services (check cashing + bill payment in one location)
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers who need emergency funds and have collateral (vehicle title) or who prefer in-person financial services, but the broken website and lack of transparent pricing information makes it difficult to assess actual terms and competitiveness. Prospective borrowers should contact them directly or visit a physical store to understand specific APRs, fees, and repayment terms before committing.
